title: One Player Sleep
description: A simple one player sleep system for multiplayer games
body:
# One Player Sleep - Datapack
This datapack modifies Minecraft’s default sleeping behavior by changing the sleep percentage gamerule to allow the game to transition from night to day once a single player sleeps, rather than requiring all players on the server to sleep simultaneously.
### Features:

- Enables immediate night skipping when just one player sleeps.
- Maintains vanilla Minecraft gameplay without adding complex mechanics.
- Compatible with multiplayer servers, improving playability for small groups or communities.

### User Experience Improvements:

- Eliminates the frustration of waiting for all players to sleep or having to leave and rejoin while someone is trying to sleep, allowing night to pass more quickly.
- Encourages smoother cooperative gameplay and reduces downtime during nighttime.
- Enhances server playability for players with varied schedules or those joining and leaving the game asynchronously.

By simplifying the sleep mechanic, this datapack creates a more seamless multiplayer experience without altering other game rules or behaviors.
